_doc: Raven Hollow RUNEWORDS (design/RUNEWORDS.md 5). Fill ALL sockets of an eligible base with the exact rune sequence (left to right) and the item is a named artifact. key = '_'.join(sequence). RunewordSystem.check_runeword matches: item.sockets == sequence length AND item.runes == sequence AND item.slot == slot AND base rarity in {common,uncommon,rare} AND item.ilvl >= min_base_ilvl. 'bonuses' = the combined artifact statline granted via StatsSystem.add_modifier when the word completes on an EQUIPPED item (keys map 1:1 onto StatsSystem stat mods). 'effect' = the player.gd artifact-effect id (id already reserved; wiring is a later pass). 'whisper' = the tooltip flavor line. Sequences are NOT listed in-game (found as lore fragments) -- this file is the engine registry only.

veth_om.name: VETH-OM
veth_om.whisper: the ground under you is patient. it has been waiting for someone to stand still.

kar_dra.name: KAR-DRA
kar_dra.whisper: it drinks what it corrects. you feel steadier with every stroke, and you decide not to ask why.

sul_thar.name: SUL-THAR
sul_thar.whisper: the well listens back now. when you cut a voice off mid-sentence, it pays you for the silence.

isk_nul.name: ISK-NUL
isk_nul.whisper: the dust holds its lines while you move through it. nothing marks your passing. nothing rises.

mor_zev.name: MOR-ZEV
mor_zev.whisper: the thread wants hands. the grave keeps offering. for twelve seconds at a time, they agree.

dra_sul.name: DRA-SUL
dra_sul.whisper: the well refills when you have thirsted enough. do not ask from where. the water tastes of coins.

thar_isk_kar.name: THAR-ISK-KAR
thar_isk_kar.whisper: listen. align. correct. the dust points at what you are about to hit, if nothing touches you first.

om_ur.name: OM-UR
om_ur.whisper: the record declines the edit. for two heartbeats you are every stone in its place, and nothing can be added.

veth_mor_dra.name: VETH-MOR-DRA
veth_mor_dra.whisper: the ground is warm because it is fed. it is fed because you are generous. the furrows do not ask why.

azh_ur.name: AZH-UR
azh_ur.whisper: erase. restore. the same operation. what you finish leaves no wound, because it was never, in the record, there.
